title: GEEPAS Portable Blender | Electric Cordless Mini Blender for Smoothies Shakes Fruits Food Travel Gym Office | Compact USB Rechargeable Six Blade Ice Crush Personal Blender | 1 Year Warranty 330ML Grey
features: ✅ CORDLESS BLENDING FREEDOM-Ditch the wires and blend anywhere with this fully rechargeable smoothie blender. Powered by a dual 1500mAh lithium battery, blenders for kitchen are perfect for the gym, work, camping, or travel. No cords, no limits—just fresh smoothies on demand with blender smoothie maker.

✅ USB RECHARGEABLE WITH QUICK CHARGE-Charge food blender using your laptop, power bank, or wall plug with the included USB cable. A full charge in just 4–5 hours delivers 10–13 minutes of continuous blending of baby food blender —ideal for multiple smoothies. Stay powered up with bullet blender for healthy living on the move.

✅ 6 SHARP BLADES FOR POWERFUL PERFORMANCE-Equipped with 6 ultra-durable 304 stainless steel blades, this small blender effortlessly crushes ice, fruits and veggies. The blender bottle's 30-second blending cycle ensures silky smoothies every time. Compact doesn’t mean weak— juicer blender is blending power you can carry.

✅ BUILT-IN FILTER FOR SMOOTH RESULTS-Enjoy pulp-free, smooth drinks thanks to the integrated filter in baby blender that separates seeds and chunks. Food blenders for kitchen are perfect for juices, shakes, and even baby food. Blender for smoothies has clean sipping from the first pour to the last drop.

✅ 2-IN-1 BLENDER & DRINKING CUP-No need to transfer—blend and sip directly from the same BPA-free blenders for smoothies. The enclosed blade design makes portable smoothie blender safe to drink straight from the cup. One-touch operation makes mixer blender effortless and mess-free.
description: Product Description STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Our portable smoothie blender has 6 blades made of 304 stainless steel. ONE CLICK BUTTON Just one button to start Blend mode perfect for foods like banana, strawberry etc. INTEGRATED FILTER Separating solids from liquids, ensuring a smoother texture for your beverages. 330ML CAPCITY Suitable for individual servings, with AS bottle.
